name: kanban-board-01
title: Kanban Board 01
author: ilinxa
description: Column-based board with drag-and-drop, swimlanes, color-tinted columns, and a pluggable renderer registry that hosts any card kind as a first-class item. Items are pure JSON; built-in renderers ship for kanban-card and kanban-note, and any sibling rich component (e.g. rich-card) can be registered as a third renderer with full feature passthrough via the dragHandle="header" pattern. Per-column movement controls, per-item lock, optional CRUD, collapsible columns, soft maxItems cap, native column scroll.
